one_liner: Use Claude code workflows to analyze existing reporting views and auto-generate star schema fact and dimension tables; Cutting the manual work of semantic layer development from months to weeks.
success_story: Semantic layer development moves from months to weeks ‚ Claude analyzes reporting views and drafts new fact and dimension tables without manual spec for every schema change.
next_steps: Accessing data ‚Äî need to pull data automatically or via API
next_steps_notes: Detailed plan at GitHub link. All pieces in place ‚Äî needs team validation meeting. CB2 workflow documented.

one_liner: Custom observation form for school operations walkthroughs that routes data directly to Google Sheets ‚replacing paper logs and manual rekeying.

one_liner: Generates randomized grade-level NJSLA practice quizzes from a 900+ item bank ‚Äî replacing the manual process of pulling and formatting test prep materials each week.
success_story: Math teachers and instructional leaders generate a differentiated quiz for a specific grade and standard in under a minute ‚Äî weekly test prep no longer eats into planning time.
savings_hours: Weekly planning time saved on test prep
next_steps_notes: Used by T&L Math ADs and 3rd-8th grade teachers. Next: QR code scanning for student work and batch processing.

one_liner: Next.js app replacing a manual Google Sheet for tracking KIPP Forward alumni career milestones ‚Äî with Salesforce data integration for automatic student info rollups.

next_steps: Deploying it ‚Äî need to host or share more effectively, Permissions and logins ‚Äî need to control access
next_steps_notes: Needs OAuth (Google auth) and hosting config before production. Automation for upcoming graduation dates is a planned next step.

project_name: Focus SIS | Centralized Database of FLDOE Data Fields
one_liner: Parses 600+ FLDOE state PDFs into a centralized searchable database of student and staff data fields ‚Äî eliminating manual lookup for the Focus implementation team.
success_story: Focus implementation team and Miami compliance director can search FLDOE data field requirements in one place ‚Äî no more digging through hundreds of state PDFs for every compliance question.
next_steps_notes: PDF parser accuracy and FLDOE field change monitoring are key next steps.

project_name: Focus SIS | AI Project Manager Assistant

delivery_type: A prompt or conversation ‚Äî nothing to hand off
next_steps_notes: Currently used by Laszlo; expanding to full Focus transition team. Future Asana and Google Sheets integrations planned.

one_liner: Claude Code workflow to extract thousands of calculations that live only on our Tableau Workbooks and provides suggestions on how to either: move the calculations upstream to the BQ views OR creating/adding to a dim/fact table(s) for the semantic layer.
success_story: We will be able to significantly reduce the effort it will take to convert the thousands of isolated, Tableau-only calculations to either a database field or a semantic layer calculation so they can be used on other reports.
savings_replacing: Manual retrieval and manual analysis of thousands of Tableau-only calculated fields
next_steps: Not sure yet

This allows KFwd stakeholders to paste career launch data into a spreadsheet that will then be treated as survey responses.
success_story: Saves the career team substantially on data entry time.

one_liner: It will nearly instantaneously schedule a meeting for any size group of people by scanning their Outlooks to find mutually available time or conflicts that can be rescheduled.

This directly supports KIPP Miami leadership strategic planning and growth decision making, finance team with financial planning, builds a collaboration bridge between KIPP Miami leadership, finance team, and innovation team.
success_story: Leadership can stress-test expansion scenarios and monitor covenant compliance (Days Cash on Hand, Debt Service Coverage Ratio) without waiting for finance team to build custom reports. Turns a quarterly reporting cycle into on-demand visibility across 2 Miami-Dade schools and future Broward expansion. Saves finance leads an estimated 10-20 hours per quarter.

next_steps_notes: Built with Vercel, GitHub, and Claude API. Interactive financial modeling that would typically require specialized consultants or complex Excel workbooks.
